mapper.select: SELECT scm.id, u.username, scm.chat_type, CASE WHEN scm.chat_type = 2 AND fs.id IS NULL THEN N'該旅程分享已被移除' ELSE scm.content END AS content, scm.trip_plan_id, fs.name_zh_tw AS from_station_name, ts.name_zh_tw AS to_station_name, utp.fare_type, utp.fare_price, utp.transfer_count, scm.created_at FROM [dbo].[station_chat_messages] scm INNER JOIN [dbo].[users] u ON u.id = scm.user_id LEFT JOIN [dbo].[user_trip_plans] utp ON utp.id = scm.trip_plan_id AND utp.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN [dbo].[stations] fs ON fs.id = utp.from_station_id LEFT JOIN [dbo].[stations] ts ON ts.id = utp.to_station_id WHERE scm.station_id = #{stationId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND scm.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY scm.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM [dbo].[station_chat_messages] WHERE station_id = #{stationId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT sca.id, sca.station_id, sca.content, u.username AS created_by_username, sca.created_at, sca.updated_at FROM [dbo].[station_chat_announcements] sca INNER JOIN [dbo].[users] u ON u.id = sca.created_by WHERE sca.station_id = #{stationId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND sca.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY sca.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO [dbo].[station_chat_announcements] (station_id, content, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{announcement.stationId}, #{announcement.content}, #{announcement.createdBy}, #{announcement.createdAt}, #{announcement.updatedAt})
